titleStmt.title: SII 40.186: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 186. (A.R. No. B. 321 of 1931.) Tāḷḷapalli, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the ruined temple of Lakshmīnārāyaṇasvāmi.
This is dated Śaka 1191, Śukla, Āśvayuja, śu. 15, Friday, lunar eclipse, corresponding to 1269 A.D., October 11.

Records the gift of taxes of Tāḍlapalli for burning a perpetual lamp to the temple of Lakshmīnārāyaṇadēva by Mahāpradhāni Pōṅkala Mallaya Pregaḍa, the bāhattara niyōgādhipati of the king, for the merit of his lord. Further it records the gift of land by Bāri-Hemmayya of Tāḍlapalli for the merit of his master Tripurāridēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
hari Ōṁ . jayaṁti madajñānatē
mattaskarabhāskaraḥ rāmānujapadā
bhōjabhūṣaṇaḥ puruṣōttamaḥ .
svasti śrī śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1191 Agu
nēṁṭi śukla saṁvatsara Āśvayuja śuddha
15 śukravāramunāṁḍu sōmagrahaṇa
puṇyakālamunaṁdu svasti śrīmanmahā
maṁḍalēśvara kākatiyya rudradēva
mahārājula rājyamunaṁdu bā
hattara niyōgādhipatiyaina śrīmanmahā
pradhāni pōṁkalamallayapregaḍa taṁmēli
narudradēvamahārājulakuṁ buṇyamu
gānu tāḍlapalli śrīlakṣmīnārāyaṇadēva
radīpālaku Ā tāḍlapalli suṁkamu Ā
caṁdrā¨rkasthāyigānu dhārāpū¨rvvakamu
sēsi Iccenu . bhūmi suṁkarulu E
vvarainānu I kramānanē celliṁci puṇya
musēkonuvāru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ
vāyō harēti vasuṁdharā . ṣaṣṭi¨rvva
ruṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāya
tē krimi . śrīmatubārihemmaya
tāḍlapalli tanavritti cenu tannu Ēlina tri
purāridēvaniki puṇyamugānu la
kṣmīnārāyaṇadēvaraku Aṁgaraṁgabhōgā
laku Iccinadi kha 1 maṟu 1 .
Digital edition of SII 40.186 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
